episodes.title: Alan Drever lawyers up. No comment on touching. PBCC
Cheryl Bawtinheimer and The Plymouth Brethren in Maple Creek
episodes.description:
Welcome to Owl News — formerly Community TV in Medicine Hat.
www.owlnews.ca Thank you for watching!

We are an independent digital news outlet based in Medicine Hat, Alberta, serving Southern Alberta and Southwest Saskatchewan. For years, our audience knew us as Community TV. Today, we’ve evolved into Owl News — sharper, faster, and fully independent.

We cover local politics, town halls, protests, city council, crime, courts, healthcare, education, and the stories mainstream outlets often overlook. If it impacts Medicine Hat or the surrounding region, we’re there with cameras rolling.

Our reporting is boots-on-the-ground, unfiltered, and focused on transparency and accountability. We believe local journalism matters — especially in smaller cities where decisions directly shape everyday lives.

Our former Facebook page was one of the most engaged local news platforms in the region. It generated strong community support before being classified as “official Canadian News,” which restricted visibility inside Canada. While that changed our distribution there, it did not slow us down.

Our YouTube channel continues to grow rapidly, and this is now our primary platform. We publish full event coverage, interviews, breaking developments, and exclusive local reporting. Some supporters even choose to become channel members, paying a small monthly fee to access certain videos early and support independent local journalism.

If you care about Medicine Hat, Southern Alberta, or Southwest Saskatchewan — subscribe and stay informed.

Follow Owl News everywhere:

Facebook (formerly Community TV Medicine Hat):
https://www.facebook.com/MHOWLNEWS

YouTube:
https://www.youtube.com/@medhatowl

X (Twitter):
https://x.com/mhowlnews

Bluesky:
https://bsky.app/profile/mhowlnews.bsky.social

Independent. Local. Watching.

episodes.title: Leaked Security camera footage from Queen Romana Didulo Cult Kingdowm Of Canada Sovereign Sewer Raid

http://www.comtv.ca
Medicine Hat's local web-based broadcaster!

episodes.title: 💧🚽 Sovereign Sewage: The Queen, The Cult, and The Great Richmound Water Heist
episodes.description:
On July 18, 2025, RCMP officers executed a sudden operation at the abandoned school housing Queen Romana Didulo’s so-called "Kingdom of Canada" in Richmound, Saskatchewan. The raid followed suspicions of unauthorized water use, potential infrastructure damage, and growing concern from municipal authorities. One man, believed to be Ricky Lee Manz, was detained. Community TV was on the scene moments later to document the fallout—including confrontations with irate neighbours.

This may be the beginning of the end for the cult’s grip on this small prairie village.

WATCH THE FULL STORY UNFOLD.
